spec_match.rationale: Multi-stage guide now models the current Chrome 150 migrate_from / allow_migration handshake across the server, Chrome, and the user-visible update prompt.

interactive.rationale: Excellent. Features an interactive four-phase horizontal tab row updating states, actor roles, and data persistence tables dynamically.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the parent walkthrough after the index was updated to describe the destination manifest, old-origin association, and user-visible migration review.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers optional migrate_to discovery, suggest versus force behavior, origin-scoped storage partitioning, and data survival after the accepted migration.

references.rationale: See-also now includes the mandatory ChromeStatus link and current Chrome Developers migration reference.

design_system.rationale: Neat tab bar styling, side-by-side data grids, and actor labels.

summary: Re-reviewed after the Chrome 150 migration contract was corrected. The concept now uses migrate_from, allow_migration, optional migrate_to, and the user-visible prompt flow, and includes the required ChromeStatus reference.
